## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, performance, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Production Focus:** Shifting to content refreshes to leverage existing assets, as the pipeline is healthy with 14 articles in review and 30+ approved topics.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [**AI Performance:** Strapi has 100% visibility on core headless CMS prompts, with Gemini showing strong growth in referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**Process Automation:** Theo is building a N8N workflow to automate Airtable/Slack updates on content publication, solving a key tracking challenge.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Website Bug:** The comparison page display bug will not be fixed, as a new website launching in April will render the work redundant.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Pipeline

  - [**Pipeline Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [14 articles in review](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [17 approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [13 integration pages ready](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**New Focus → Content Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Rationale: Leverage existing high-intent content assets.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [Tracking: Airtable is being updated to better track refresh projects.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Form Embeds:**](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Status: Fixed by Notum.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Action: Theo to confirm correct portal ID is used.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### Performance & AI Visibility

  - [**Overall Performance:** Sessions and engagement remain strong.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Integration Pages:** High engagement confirms high user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**AI Visibility (7-Week View):**](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
      - [Core Headless CMS Prompts: Strapi mentioned 100% of the time.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
      - [Referral Traffic Sources:](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
          - [Top 3: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
          - [Growth: Gemini and CoPilot are increasing, driven by Google's mobile AI integration.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [**Check That Platform:**](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [Access: Theo and Victor have access.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [New Prompts: \~45 integration-related prompts added to gather data.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### Process & Tooling

  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Moving to bi-weekly (next: March 3) to reflect a stable workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Content OS:**](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Goal: Replace Airtable for a unified workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Timeline: Launch may be accelerated.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Publication Automation:**](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [Problem: Manual tracking in Airtable and Slack is inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [Solution: Theo is building an N8N workflow to automate updates on publication.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### Website Bug: Comparison Pages

  - [**Issue:** Content cards on comparison pages are not displaying on the front end.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [**Decision:** No fix will be implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Rationale: A new website is launching in April, making a fix redundant.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Impact: This will delay the live publication of new comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/uqK-VSsB6cszdfwYC6zt6UeJWjywTpFP?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
